title: Smoky Chewy Egyptian Lamb Skewers
description: Impress your loved ones with these romantic and flavorful skewers of lamb loin chops, marinated in a rich Egyptian-inspired mixture of spices and herbs, then grilled to perfection on a hot stone plate.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, extra virgin olive oil for the best flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the lamb loin chops to the marinade and mix until they are well coated.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated lamb loin chops onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill or grill pan and cook for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a hot stone plate and garnish with chopped parsley and cilantro.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Slice the skewers into thin strips and serve with your favorite sides or as a main course.
You can also serve the skewers with a side of tzatziki sauce for an extra burst of flavor.
